steps_raw.instruction: Print the required labels needed for Bray extraction for each site, depth, and replicate.
Weigh out 2 g of soil into labeled 50 mL centrifuge tubes.
Add 14 mL of Bray Extract solution (in cabinet under hood in 1521) using the pipet and electronic pipettor.
Cap the samples and shake to mix. Add samples to foam block on shaker.
Centrifuge samples (using centrifuge on west side of 1521) for 4000 rpm, , 8 minutes .
Pour off liquid into a clean and labelled 15 mL centrifuge tube.
Freeze samples on their side to prevent tube breaking in the -20 °C freezer (Staging Freezer 2) bottom shelf if unable to filter immediately.
Follow sample filtering protocol below when ready to filter extracts.
